overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a forested wetland area. The character travels along a dirt path, passes a small wooden settlement with NPCs, and continues through a swampy region with standing water and dead trees under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding forest path surrounded by dense pine trees

entered.detail: large grey boulder formation beside the path
tall pine trees forming dense woodland
tall pine trees forming dense woodland
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character walking through a dense forest environment. The path is narrow and winding, flanked by tall pine trees and a large rock formation visible to the right. The atmosphere is quiet and overcast with no other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden settlement clearing with NPC activity

events.description: exiting dense forest into open settlement area with wooden structures
turning right to navigate around the settlement buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching and navigating around a small settlement with wooden huts and villagers

notable_agents.action: villagers gathered near wooden structures in the settlement

entered.detail: small wooden huts and structures with thatched roofs
sparse trees and stumps marking the settlement edge

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense forest into a clearing containing a small wooden settlement. Several NPC villagers are visible near the wooden structures. The character turns right to navigate around the settlement before continuing toward a marshy area.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded swamp with dead trees and wooden markers

events.description: path becomes flooded entering deep swamp water
passing wooden flag poles marking the swamp path

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep swamp water along a marked trail

entered.detail: murky standing water covering the path
leafless dead trees emerging from the swamp
tall wooden poles with tattered flags marking the trail
decayed logs floating in the marsh water

segments.scene_description: The character enters a flooded swamp area where the path is submerged in murky water. Dead trees and wooden flag poles mark the route through the marsh. The environment is desolate with no other characters present as the character wades through the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: swamp trail with large oak tree and wooden fencing

events.description: exiting deep water back onto drier swamp path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the swamp path passing a large ancient oak tree

entered.detail: massive gnarled oak tree with sprawling branches
weathered wooden posts lining the path
misty tree line visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character exits the deep water and continues along a drier swamp path. A massive ancient oak tree dominates the left side of the frame while wooden fence posts line the right. The path leads toward a distant foggy forest under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest that transitions into a small settlement before descending into a desolate, flooded marshland. It begins on a narrow, winding path flanked by tall pine trees and a large rock formation under a quiet, overcast sky. As the character emerges from the woods, the scene opens into a clearing containing a small wooden settlement with several villagers, before the camera turns right to leave the village behind. The environment then shifts into a flooded swamp where the path is submerged in murky water and marked by dead trees and wooden flag poles. Finally, the character exits the deep water onto a drier path lined with fence posts and dominated by a massive ancient oak tree, leading toward a distant, foggy forest.
